services.9router: AI provider router on port 20128, 18 providers, 9 active. Routes to GitHub Copilot, Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more.
services.dashboard: ZES Control Center v4 on port 8083. Real-time SSE push every 3s. Tabs: Services, Providers, MCP, Audit Log, Terminal, Settings. Left drawer nav with service status + quick links. Mobile-optimized.
services.hermes: Gateway/cron scheduler. 10 cron jobs: daily-health-check, log-cleanup, model-rotation, dashboard-snapshot, ip-rotation, eval-service-health, config-backup, mcp-health-check, provider-audit, security-scan.
services.claude_code: Anthropic Claude Code v2.1.207. CLI tool via proot-distro Debian. Not a web server (port: 0). Run with: claude "prompt" or claude -p "task"
services.codex: AI API proxy + Zen gateway on port 5900.
services.vscode_server: Web VS Code on port 8000. Cline + Continue ready.
services.ttyd: Web terminal on port 7173. Browser-based shell access.
services.tor: SOCKS5 proxy on port 9050. Anonymizing proxy pool.
services.zeschrome_mcp: MCP server on port 5901. 18 tools: browser automation (browse, screenshot, click, type, extract, auth) + ZES system tools (check_service, list_services, get_service_logs, run_health_evals).
services.zes_bridge_mcp: MCP server via stdio. 10 tools: get_dashboard_status, get_9router_providers, check_service, list_services, restart_service, get_service_logs, rotate_tor_ip, get_hermes_cron, run_health_evals, get_claude_code_info.

security_hooks.description: Pre-tool hooks in ~/.claude.json for config protection, security gate, MCP health verification
